mac-and-cheese-gratin-teleculinaria.name: Mac And Cheese Gratin
instructions: Cook the dough in abundant water seasoned with salt, for the time indicated in the package.
Escorra a massa e envolva com o bechamel e os queijos cheddar e emental.
Tempere com sal, pimenta e salsa picada e envolva novamente.
Put it on a refractory tray and sprinkle it with mozzarella cheese. Take it to the oven, preheated to 200oC, for 10 minutes or until it is gratined. Serve right away.

make-penne-alla-boscaiola-a-special-past.name: Make Penne Alla Boscaiola, A Special Pasta Dish
make-penne-alla-boscaiola-a-special-past.original_name: Haz penne alla boscaiola, un plato de pasta especial

ingredients.item: 350 g porcini mushrooms or portobello mushrooms
3 cda de pasta o concentrado de tomate
50 gr de tomates cortados en cubos

instructions: Vamos a iniciar nuestra receta, cocinando la pasta penne siguiendo las instrucciones de la marca. Debe quedar al dente. Cuela y reserva.
Now, cut the onion into small cubes and steal the garlic.
Take the tocilet and cut it into small cubes.
Take the mushrooms or mushrooms, and you'll snap them into sheets. Like black olives.
A frying pan should be heated and a tocinet pitted without oil. Let them get some light, withdraw and reserve.
In that same frying pan, add some olive oil and scattering the garlic. Then add onion, cook for 3 minutes.
It's time to add mushrooms, mix and let cook for 3 minutes.
Agrega ahora el vino tinto, el concentrado de tomate, los tomates en trozos y las aceitunas. Condimenta con sal y pimienta al gusto.
Mezcla y baja el fuego a medio, deja cocinar por 15 minutos. Cuando pasen 10 minutos, sube el fuego para que el licor se reduzca.
It's turn to add the baked dough to the plate, mix to impregnate completely the taste.
Apaga y sirve, espolvoreando el perejil y queso parmesano.
Degusta!

make-ahead-moroccan-lamb-stew.name: Make-ahead Moroccan Lamb Stew
instructions: Combine cinnamon, cumin, salt, ginger, cloves, nutmeg, turmeric, and curry powder in a large bowl.
Add lamb to spice mixture and mix until well combined.
Melt butter in a large pot over medium heat. Add onion and sauté until soft and just beginning to brown, 5 to 10 minutes. Add spiced lamb; cook and stir until browned and crumbly, 6 to 8 minutes.
Add consommé, garbanzo beans, beef broth, chicken broth, diced tomatoes, sweet potatoes, carrots, lentils, apricots, and honey; bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer until vegetables and lentils are tender, about 30 minutes. Season with pepper.

make-ahead-sausage-and-veggie-bowls.name: Make-ahead Sausage And Veggie Bowls
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Cover a large 12x17-inch baking sheet with aluminum foil and grease with cooking spray.

Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat. Add brown rice and saute for 2 to 3 minutes. Add water and salt. Cover and simmer over medium-low heat until water is absorbed, 20 to 30 minutes.

Meanwhile, place sausages on one end of the baking sheet. Place onion next to the sausages. Place Brussels sprouts next to onion. Sprinkle garlic powder, salt, and pepper over vegetables. Drizzle with 1 1/2 tablespoons oil. Toss to coat.

Roast in the preheated oven for 10 minutes. Remove baking sheet from the oven. Stir vegetables and turn sausages over. Add bell pepper to the baking sheet and drizzle with remaining 1/2 tablespoon olive oil. Season with salt and pepper. Toss to coat. Return to the oven for an additional 10 minutes. Let cool.
Slice sausages into bite-sized pieces. Divide brown rice, vegetables, and sausage pieces evenly among the 5 containers. Top with Parmesan cheese.

malaguena-lemon-and-dill-vinaigrette.name: Malaguena Lemon And Dill Vinaigrette

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Stir vinegar and mustard together in a small bowl until smooth. Stir dill, garlic, and lemon juice into vinegar mixture. Slowly stream olive oil into mixture while whisking continuously until dressing is creamy and smooth. Season with salt and pepper.

mama-gunns-pound-cake.name: Mama Gunn's Pound Cake
instructions: Preheat oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Grease and flour a 9-inch fluted tube pan (such as a Bundt®).

Mix flour, baking powder, and salt together in a bowl; sift the flour mixture twice into a separate bowl. Cream butter, shortening, and sugar in another large bowl until smooth; stir eggs and milk into creamed mixture until thoroughly combined.

Gradually mix flour into moist ingredients to make a smooth batter; stir lemon and vanilla extracts into batter. Continue mixing until no sugar granules are visible. Pour batter into prepared tube pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until top is springy and cake is set in the center, about 90 minutes. Let cake cool in the pan until sides separate from pan; turn out onto a rack to finish cooling.

mango-and-passion-fruit-smoothie.name: Mango And Passion Fruit Smoothie
instructions: Combine all ingredients in blender and process until smooth. Divide smoothie between 2 glasses and serve.

manicotti-with-ricotta.name: Manicotti With Ricotta
instructions: Using an electric mixer on high speed, beat eggs in a large bowl until light, airy, pale in color, and can nearly hold peaks, 6–8 minutes.

Reduce mixer speed to low. Gradually add flour and salt, beating well between additions, until no clumps of flour remain. With mixer speed on low, slowly pour in 1½ cups water and continue to beat until well incorporated. Cover and let dough rest at least 2 hours (this gives the flour time to hydrate and results in a smoother finished texture).

Heat a small nonstick skillet over medium and spray with nonstick spray. Pour 2 Tbsp. batter into skillet and cook, swirling skillet constantly to encourage crepe to form a nice, round shape, until set, 15–20 seconds. Tap out crepe onto a clean towel; gently flatten any creases. Repeat with remaining batter; if possible, do not stack crepes.
Do Ahead: Dough can be made 1 day ahead; keep covered and chill.

Heat the milk and the cream on a heavy bottomed pot/pan until the cream reaches 93°C.  Stirring as the milk heats up and make sure it doesn't come to a boil.  Once milk registers 93°C remove from heat and stir in the salt and vinegar.  Stir gently for a few seconds and try to create a gently whirling effect to mix the salt and vinegar.  This will cause the milk to break into curds.  Let the swirling mixture sit at room temp for 10-15 minutes.

Strain the mixture using cheesecloth and a metal strainer.  All of the trapped curds in the cloth is the ricotta cheese. Let the cheese hang in the cloth until the desired moisture level is reached. More time draining the drier the cheese.  The leftover is milk whey which can be used for other projects and dishes. Store in fridge and use ASAP.

Preheat oven to 177°C. Mix egg yolks, ricotta, mozzarella, and Parmesan in a large bowl; season with salt and pepper. Squeeze out excess liquid from spinach, if using, and add to egg mixture; toss to coat.

Spread 1 cup sauce in a 13x9" baking pan. Working one at a time, spoon 2 Tbsp. filling in center of crepe. Spread filling all the way to the ends. Roll up crepe, then flatten slightly with your hands. Transfer seam side down to prepared dish. Working in batches if needed, repeat with remaining crepes and filling, leaving a small gap in between each. Top with sauce and cover with foil. Bake manicotti until cheese is melted and sauce is bubbling, 35–45 minutes. Let manicotti cool slightly in pan to set, about 15 minutes. Top with Parmesan and pepper before serving. Repeat full process in a second 13x9" baking pan with extra crepes and ricotta filling, if desired. Can be stored in fridge or freezer for later or cooked for additional servings.
Do Ahead: Filling can be made 1 day ahead; cover and chill. Manicotti can be made 1 month ahead; transfer to airtight containers or freezer bags and freeze.
Recipe by Brad Leone

maple-brown-sugar-oatmeal-muffins.name: Maple Brown Sugar Oatmeal Muffins
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line a muffin tin with paper liners.
Combine butter, white sugar, and brown sugar in a large bowl; beat with an electric mixer until creamy. Add applesauce, maple syrup, egg, and vanilla extract; mix well.
Combine flour, walnuts, oats, whole wheat flour, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt in a separate bowl. Add to the butter mixture, stirring just until all ingredients are moistened.
Spoon batter into the prepared muffin cups, filling each 2/3 full.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, 15 to 18 minutes. Allow to cool in the tin for several minutes before removing.

maple-syrup-vinaigrette.name: Maple Syrup Vinaigrette
instructions: Whisk olive oil, Dijon mustard, balsamic vinegar, maple syrup, salt, and pepper together in a bowl. Serve immediately.

matcha-mango-smoothie.name: Matcha-mango Smoothie
instructions: Purée ginger, mango, yogurt, matcha, vanilla, agave syrup, if using, and ½ cup cold water in a blender until smooth, then divide between glasses.

matilda-cake-argiro.name: Matilda Cake
instructions: We bring all materials to room temperature. Preheat the oven to 170°C in the air.
Butter two baking pans preferably 20 (or 22) cm and spread them with non-stick paper.
Shake flour, soda and cocoa in a bowl, add the sugar and salt and mix.
Add the oil, eggs, sour milk and vanilla and mix with the wire.
Add the hot coffee drink and mix quickly.

Equalize the mixture to the baking pans and bake the cakes in a preheated oven on the medium grill for about 22-25 minutes, until the blade of the knife that will be inserted into their hearts comes out dry of dough.
Allow them to stand for 15 minutes on their baking pans and then ungulate them in a grill to cool completely.

matrix-mirror-glaze-cake.name: Matrix Mirror Glaze Cake

ingredients.prep: dyed with black food coloring, frozen
dyed with green food coloring, frozen

instructions: Prepare the cake layers: Using a 2-inch round cutter, cut out a circle from the center of the black cake. Using a 4-inch round cutter, cut out a ring from the center of the same cake. Using a 6-inch round cutter, cut out another ring from the center of the cake. Set aside and repeat with the green cake. You should have 4 pieces of black cake and 4 pieces of green cake.
Reassemble the rings of the black and green cakes to create 2 layers with alternating colors, resembling bull’s-eyes.

Place an 8-inch cardboard cake round on a turntable. Spread a small dollop of chocolate frosting on the cake board and place a cake layer on top. Spread an even layer of frosting over the cake, then place the second layer on top. Spread an even layer of frosting over the top and sides of the cake, smoothing flat. Freeze the cake for at least 1 hour, up to overnight.
Make the mirror glaze: Add the white chocolate chips to a medium bowl and set aside.
Place the gelatin sheets in a small bowl with ½ cup water. Set aside to bloom for 10 minutes.
Add the remaining ½ cup water, the sugar, and sweetened condensed milk to a small saucepan and bring to a gentle simmer over medium heat. Remove the pot from the heat.
Remove the gelatin sheets from the water and add to the saucepan. Whisk until dissolved.
Strain the gelatin mixture through a fine-mesh sieve into the bowl with the white chocolate chips and whisk until the chocolate chips have melted and the mixture is smooth.
Add the black food coloring and silver luster dust, and whisk to combine. Continue whisking constantly until the glaze has cooled to 32°C (32°C), 30–40 minutes.

Place the frozen cake on a wire rack set over a baking sheet. Slowly pour the glaze over the top of the cake, allowing it to drip down the sides until the cake is fully coated. Let the cake rest until the glaze has set completely, about 20 minutes.
Transfer the cake to a serving plate, then slice and serve.
Enjoy!

meat-pasta-lezzet.name: Meat Pasta
instructions: 1. Inner mortar in the olive oil of the coastline and grated onion.
2. Add salt and pepper and taste.
3. Extract dough into kneading container.
4. Open in the form of the pool; mash and break the eggs and relax by adding milk.
5. Take the hard consistency dough 6 cloths that you are kneading.
6. Wait for 2 hours by covering the cloths with a damp cloth.
7. Light-and-flavored to the cloths uniform
8. Cut rounds with the mouth of the bar and share them to the tributor interior.
9. Fold and close it.
10. Salt is boiled in boiling water and flavored with oil addition.
11. 11. Serve with a sauce you want.

meat-soup-with-pasta-recipe-comedera.name: Meat Soup With Pasta Recipe
meat-soup-with-pasta-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de sopa de carne con pasta

ingredients.item: 400 gr de carne de res (falda, morcillo o similar)
3 or 4 pieces of re bone (depending on size)

instructions: ara lograr una sopa con mucho sabor vamos a empezar a hacerla 2 horas antes del momento de comerla.
Primero vas a llenar una olla grande con abundante agua, unos 4 litros.
En esa olla vas a echar los trozos de hueso y vas a cocinarlos a fuego alto.
Deja que hierva por media hora aproximadamente.
After time, add minced meat into medium pieces. Put the fire down and let another while cook (30 minutes).
A medida que hierve ve retirando la espuma que se va a ir formando en la superficie del caldo.
In the meantime go and prepare the other ingredients.
It pits potatoes and carrots into cubes and medium-sized wheels, respectively.
He also pics his cellery and his leek into medium pieces.
The onion cut into cubes.
When the meat takes about 30 to 40 minutes while cooking and adds all other ingredients: all vegetables, oregano, laurel and salt and pepper to suit. Don't put the dough up yet.
as she goes cooking she sees her taste tested if she lacks salt.
Also check that the broth will not evaporate too much, if necessary you can add some more water.

When the soup has about 45 minutes after they have put up all the vegetables, that's about 1 hour and 45 minutes after you started everything, then I should be about ready. Test the meat, be soft and have potatoes and carrots about soft.
That's right. Let them cook about 10 more minutes or till they're ready.
After this time, your meat soup with vegetables and pasta will be ready.
Apaga el fuego y deja reposar antes de servirla.

meat-lovers-vegetarian-chili.name: Meat-lovers' Vegetarian Chili

ingredients.prep: seeded and minced, or more to taste

instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-low heat. Cook and stir bell peppers, poblano peppers, onion, garlic, and jalapeño in hot oil until soft, about 15 minutes. Transfer to a slow cooker.
Combine hot vegetable broth and TVP in a medium bowl; stir and let sit until liquid is absorbed, about 5 minutes. Add to the slow cooker.

Place diced tomatoes, kidney beans, black beans, beer, vinegar, tomato paste, nutritional yeast, soy sauce, lemon juice, chili powder, cocoa powder, seasoned salt, Worcestershire sauce, paprika, cumin, oregano, liquid smoke, black pepper, and sugar into the slow cooker. Mix well to combine.
Cook on Low for 6 to 10 hours or High for 4 to 5 hours.

medovik-lezzet.name: Medovik
instructions: 1. Firstly melt butter, honey and sugar in jealous fire, taking into a pot.
2. After the melting process, leave the stove off.
3. Beat eggs in a different container.
4. Then stir with the whisked wire by adding to the butter mixture.
5. Add baking powder on it.
6. Add and mix the mixture by ejecting it to be half a glass every time.
7. Mix it until you get a consistency that sticks lightly.
8. The dough is divided into 8 equal parts.
9. Remove the kitchen countertop and open the dough pieces with the help of roller on the countertop.
10. Cut the dough you open in round with the base of 10 cm cake mold.
11. 11. Place oil paper cool and round dough on the oven tray.
12. Cook 8 pieces of dough in 180-grade oven for 5 minutes.
12. August Spread the dough on the edge.
14 July Nicely rub the cream and powder sugar.
15. Mix again by adding cheese on the lab.
16. Place one of the chopped dough in the serving plate.
17. September Remove the cream you prepared on and release.
18. Place the second dough on the same way and re-cream.
19. September Apply this process until all dough finishes.
20. Cover both above and edges with cream when you add the latest dough.
21. Put the cream on the top.
22. Place Seasonal Fruits such as blueberries, bulled, strawberry.
23.  Afiyet olsun.
24. What are the Tricks of the Medovik Recipe?The cooking of butter in jealous fire prevents sugar from caramelizing and dibe adhesion.
25. sour cream and sugar are used in the original recipe for filling cream.
26. But you can also use cake cream.
27. Instead of cooking the dough at the same time, your only cooking will result better with a break of 5 minutes.
28. You can increase the flavor of medovic cake using homemade cream schanti.

merveilles.name: Merveilles

ingredients.item: All-purpose flour plus more for dusting

instructions: Whisk 1 cup flour, baking powder, and salt in a medium bowl; set aside. Blend sugar and zest in a medium bowl with your fingertips until sugar is fragrant. Add butter; use a spatula to blend. Add egg, brandy, and vanilla; stir to blend. Add dry ingredients; stir until a moist dough forms. Transfer to a sheet of plastic; wrap tightly and chill for at least 2 hours and preferably overnight.

Line a baking sheet with plastic wrap. Cut dough in half. Generously flour work surface (the dough is sticky). Working with 1 piece of dough at a time (chill remaining dough), dust top with more flour and roll out, turning occasionally to make sure it's not sticking; roll out dough as thinly as possible, turning and dusting with flour as needed.

Working with a zigzag pastry or ravioli cutter, a plain pizza wheel, or a long knife, cut dough into long strips, squares, diamonds, or shape of your choice. Place strips on prepared baking sheet; cover with another piece of plastic wrap. Repeat with remaining dough. Chill for at least 1 hour.
Pour oil into a deep saucepan to a depth of 4 inches. Attach deep-fry thermometer to side of pan; heat oil to 350°. Line a rimmed baking sheet with several layers of paper towels.

Drop 4-6 pieces of dough into pan and fry until golden on both sides, 2-3 minutes. Using a slotted spoon or tongs and allowing excess oil to drip back into pan, transfer cookies to prepared sheet to drain. Pat tops with more paper towels to blot oil. While cookies are still hot, dust both sides with powdered or cinnamon sugar. Repeat with remaining dough, returning oil to 350° between batches.
Just before serving, dust Merveilles with more sugar.

mexican-rice-casserole-with-beef-and-por.name: Mexican Rice Casserole With Beef And Pork

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Heat olive oil in a Dutch over over medium-high heat. Add green bell pepper, red bell pepper, onion, and garlic; cook and stir until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add green chiles and jalapenos; cook and stir until starting to soften, 3 to 4 minutes. Add rice; cook until coated in oil, about 3 minutes. Add broth, tomatoes, Southwest seasoning, salt, and pepper. Stir well and bring to a boil. Add lime juice and stir well. Cover with lid.
Transfer to the preheated oven and bake while you prepare the meat, 10 to 15 minutes.

Heat a skillet over medium-high heat. Add pork and beef; saute until browned and crumbly, 5 to 7 minutes. Mix in taco seasoning, chili powder, and cumin; season with salt and pepper. Add black beans and stir.

Remove rice from the oven and mix in the meat mixture; sprinkle a few tablespoons of water on top. Continue baking until rice is tender yet firm to the bite, 20 to 25 minutes. Mix in green onions and cilantro; top casserole with Cheddar cheese and mozzarella cheese. Return to oven and bake until cheeses melt, about 5 minutes more.

mexican-sopes.name: Mexican Sopes
instructions: In a medium bowl, mix the masa flour and ½ cup (120 ml) of water together with your hands. Once combined, add the rest of the water and knead until the dough forms a smooth ball.
Heat a large pan or griddle over medium-high heat.
Pat the dough out into 6 flat circles.
Fry the dough, turning frequently, until just lightly brown about 5 minutes.
Once the dough is cooked, shape the sopes by pinching the sides up to form a wall around the edge. Set aside to cool.
Rip the stems off the dried chiles and discard the seeds. Rinse the chiles, if necessary.
Add the chiles to a small pot of water and bring to a boil over high heat. Once boiling, remove the pot from the heat.
Transfer the chiles and their cooking liquid to a blender and add 1 teaspoon of salt and the garlic. Blend until smooth. Set aside.
Add the tomatoes to a small pot of water and bring to a boil. Cook until the tomato skins split, then remove from the heat and drain, reserving ½ cup (120 ml) of the tomato water.
Transfer the tomatoes to a blender with the reserved cooking liquid, oregano, and ½ teaspoon of salt. Blend until smooth. Set aside.

Heat a large pan or griddle over medium-high heat. Add the skirt steak and season with the meat seasoning and remaining teaspoon of salt. Cook the meat, flipping frequently until seared and cooked through, about 10 minutes.
Transfer the meat to a cutting board and cut into small pieces. Set aside.
Heat the corn oil in a deep, large pan over high heat.
Dip the sopes in the chile sauce, turning to coat completely.
Once the oil is hot, fry the sopes, flipping frequently, until golden brown, about 5 minutes. Drain the sopes on paper towels or a wire rack.
To serve, fill the sopes with refried beans, carne asada, shredded lettuce, tomato sauce, Mexican crema, and queso fresco.
Enjoy!

milkshake-lezzet.name: Milkshake
instructions: 1. Firstly wash and clean the berries you will use in the recipe.
2. Then pass the berries, vanilla and powder sugar from blender.
3. Mix the ingredients again by adding milk and ice cream when it comes to consistency.
4. Share the mixture to the cups when it comes to a dark consistency.
5. You can serve the milkshake's top with white chocolate rendesi and sugars.
6.  Afiyet olsun.
7. What are the Tricks of Milkshake Recipe? You can also add sliced bananas and chocolates in addition to berries.
8. For a refreshing flavor, you can add fresh mint leaves from blender to berries.
9. You can also add broken biscuit parts on the prepared milkshake.
10. 1 Cup Milkshake How Calorie?One cup of milkshake is about 160 calories.
11. 11. Calorie value will vary depending on the materials you add to.

mirandas-sweet-folar-teleculinaria.name: Miranda's Sweet Folar
instructions: Lay the flour on a countertop, add the salt and sugar, mix and open a cavity. Add the dissolved yeast in the 4dl of warm milk, the previously beaten eggs and butter and beat very well until a homogeneous and very well beaten dough. Place it in a bowl sprinkled with flour, cut it in cross, cover it with a damp cloth and let it leave till it is double the volume.

Put on a tray of butter. Knead the dough again, divide it into five parts, extend a part, dispose of it on the tray and sprinkle with some brown sugar and cinnamon powder to taste. Repeat the operation until the ingredients are finished, cover again with a damp cloth and leave another 30 minutes.

Brush with the yolk previously mixed with the 2 tablespoons of milk and bring to the oven preheated at 180°C for 40 minutes or until it is cooked. Remove from the oven, deform, let cool, cut into cubes and serve decorated to taste.

miso-chocolate-chip-cookies.name: Miso Chocolate Chip Cookies

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Whisk flour, baking soda, and salt in a medium bowl. Using an electric mixer on medium-high speed, beat butter, brown sugar, granulated sugar, and miso in a large bowl, scraping down sides of bowl as needed, until light and fluffy, about 3 minutes. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition and adding vanilla with the final egg. Using a wooden spoon, stir in dry ingredients, then stir in chocolate chips. Chill dough until firm, about 1 hour.

Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 375°. Using a 1-oz. scoop (2 Tbsp.), portion dough into balls and divide between 2 large parchment-lined baking sheets, spacing at least 2" apart. (You will have dough leftover.)

Bake cookies, rotating top to bottom and front to back, until golden brown and crisp around edges, 12–15 minutes. Transfer cookies to wire racks and let cool. Let baking sheets cool completely, then repeat process with remaining dough.
Do Ahead: Cookies can be baked 3 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

miso-turmeric-dressing.name: Miso-turmeric Dressing

ingredients.item: Finely grated peeled turmeric or  0.5 teaspoon ground turmeric

instructions:
Whisk vinegar, mirin, vegetable oil, carrot, miso, ginger, turmeric, and sesame oil in a small bowl.
Do Ahead: Dressing can be made 5 days ahead. Cover and chill.

mixed-berry-sangria.name: Mixed Berry Sangria
instructions: In a large pitcher, combine the blackberries, strawberries, blueberries, red wine, brandy, and apple juice.
Stir until mixed.
Chill for at least 4 hours.
Add the lemon-lime soda, then serve with a strawberry on each glass.
Enjoy!

mixed-berry-spinach-salad-with-strawberr.name: Mixed Berry Spinach Salad With Strawberry Balsamic Vinaigrette Dressing
instructions: For the dressing, push a straw through the strawberries from the tip to the green top to remove the hull. (Or you can cut it off with a knife!)
Add the rest of the dressing ingredients.
Blend until smooth. Refrigerate.
Cut strawberries, apple, and onion into slices.
Combine all the salad ingredients in a large bowl.
Drizzle with desired amount of dressing and toss to coat. (Spinach wilts easily, don’t add dressing until ready to eat!)
Sprinkle feta cheese on top and serve.
Enjoy!

mojo-rojo.name: Mojo Rojo

ingredients.item: Dried guindilla or new mexico chiles

instructions: Process garlic, chiles, paprika, cumin, and 1 tsp. salt in a food processor, occasionally scraping down sides of bowl, until a smooth paste forms. With machine running, drizzle in oil and process until well blended. Add Sherry and 1 tsp. water and process to blend. Season with salt.

muffin-tin-customizable-veggie-egg-cups.name: Muffin Tin Customizable Veggie Egg Cups
instructions: Preheat oven to 350ºF (180ºC).
In a greased muffin tin, place your desired combination of fillings into each muffin cup.
In a measuring cup, add salt and pepper to eggs and beat the eggs until smooth.
Season each cup with salt and pepper.
Pour the beaten eggs into each muffin cup until the liquid almost reaches the top.
Bake at 177°C (180°C) for 20 minutes, until set.
Enjoy!

mushroom-pie-without-foil-argiro.name: Mushroom Pie Without Foil

ingredients.item: 2 tabletspoon olive oil for the sauce
A little flour for the baking pan
2 tabletspoon olive oil for the sauce
A little flour for the baking pan

instructions: Heat a large pan in a high heat. Add the olive oil (2 tablespoons) to burn.
Add the bacon and mushrooms into a layer and sauce for 1 minute. Mix only once so that the mushrooms are complete cooked and dried.
Add the garlic and sauté for 1 minute more without mixing.
Sprinkle with salt, pepper and some thyme or oregano. Allow the dry mushrooms to cool.
Beat yoghurt, eggs and olive oil in a bowl with the wire to homogenize.
Add the mushrooms and the minimum moisture they have taken out in the meantime. Mix and add the grated cheeses.
Finally, gradually incorporate the flour by gently folding the mixture.
Add a small 24 cm baking pan and sprinkle with flour. We shake off the unnecessary amount.
Pour the pie mixture onto the baking pan, straightening it with a spoon to spread evenly.
We sprinkle its surface with sesame.
Bake the mushroom pie without leaves in a well preheated ocean, at 170°C, in the air, in the medium grill, for 45 minutes, until the surface is inflamed and golden.
Let it stand for 15 minutes outside the oven before cutting and serving.

mushroom-sauce.name: Mushroom Sauce
instructions: Melt 1/4 cup butter in a medium pan over medium heat. Add 2 cups sliced mushrooms; sauté until soft. Remove mushrooms from pan; set aside.

Add 1 tablespoon butter to the pan. Add shallots; cook and stir until translucent. Add ½ cup chopped mushrooms and cook until soft. Stir in red wine, thyme, and bay leaf; simmer until sauce reduces a little, about 1 minute.

Dissolve arrowroot in 1/4 cup cold beef broth. Stir remaining broth into sauce; bring to a boil. Whisk in arrowroot mixture, and stir until thick. Add reserved mushrooms. Season to taste with salt and freshly ground black pepper.

mushrooms-with-bearnaise-yogurt.name: Mushrooms With Béarnaise Yogurt

ingredients.item: A spice mill or a mortar and pestle

instructions: Bring shallot, tarragon sprigs, peppercorns, vinegar, and ⅓ cup water to a boil in a small skillet over medium heat and cook until liquid is nearly evaporated, 8–10 minutes. Let cool. Discard tarragon sprigs and transfer mixture to a small bowl. Add yogurt, lemon juice, oil, and chopped tarragon and mix well; season with salt.
Do Ahead: Yogurt can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.
Prepare a grill for medium heat. Finely grind coriander seeds in spice grinder or with mortar and pestle. Transfer to a small bowl and mix in salt, mustard powder, and paprika.
Drizzle mushrooms with oil in a medium bowl; gently toss to coat. Season with rub. Grill, turning occasionally, until browned and tender, 6–8 minutes. Serve over yogurt topped with tarragon.

cullama-meatballs-lezzet.name: Meatballs
instructions: 1. Careful preparation of the snacks for the parsleys of the fine coast and onion.
2. In a deep bowl, mix mint, parsley, onion and spices.
3. Add fine bulgura warm water and add it to the inflatable and knead.
4. Harç from Walnut size in parts copartin and press with your hands.
5. Then you can download to stretch film cover for 15 minutes.
6. Boil 2 liters of water in a pot and sprinkle salt on the interior
7. Kö from the refrigerator cook 3 minutes in boiling water after washing.
8. Then wait for the filter and tempering.
9. A bowl of eggs and yogurt for coating.
10. Ü add azar avant, salt and carbon, and mix push it until it achieves a fluid seal.
11. 11. Take a liquid oil to a pan and tease it.
